# gss_destroy_cred(_:_:)

**Function**

Purges a credential from memory.

## Declaration

```swift
func gss_destroy_cred(_ min_stat: UnsafeMutablePointer<OM_uint32>, _ cred_handle: UnsafeMutablePointer<gss_cred_id_t?>) -> OM_uint32
```

## Parameters

- **min_stat**: A pointer to the secondary status result that provides additional information in case of failure.
- **cred_handle**: The credential to eliminate from memory.

## Return Value

A status code set to [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_S_COMPLETE] on success. See [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/function-status] for a description of other status outputs.

## Discussion

This function actively purges the credential from memory and then calls [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_release_cred(_:_:)] to free the memory. This is a more secure option than calling the release function directly.

## Allocation and Deallocation

- **GSSCreateCredentialFromUUID(_:)**: Creates a credential from a universally unique identifier.
- **gss_add_cred(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:)**: Adds a new credential element to an existing credential.
- **gss_set_cred_option(_:_:_:_:)**: Changes a credential option.
- **gss_release_cred(_:_:)**: Releases the memory of a credential.
